message:
fix: resolve 3 compiler warnings in kd_tree, quantile_sketch, wavelet_tree (ft-2m466)

- kd_tree.rs: remove unnecessary mut on results variable
- quantile_sketch.rs: prefix unused proposed_weight with underscore
- wavelet_tree.rs: allow dead_code on BitVec::get helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
